stemHtml: You are on a VFR flight in VMC within a control zone and realise you cannot maintain VMC. Per ICAO Annex 2, what should you do?

options.b: Continue in IMC and land at the next suitable airport.
options.c: Continue in IMC and land at the next airport with instrument approach facilities.
options.d: Continue in VMC as far as possible and land at the nearest suitable airport immediately.
